title: Lyra-1 Autoregressive Inference Pipeline

classes.name: ARBaseGenerationPipeline
key_attributes: generic_prompt: dict  # generic t5 embeddings for DD
key_methods: __init__(inference_type, checkpoint_dir, checkpoint_name, has_text_input, offload_network, offload_tokenizer, disable_diffusion_decoder, offload_guardrail_models, offload_diffusion_decoder, disable_guardrail, parallel_size)
generate(inp_vid, sampling_config, num_input_frames, seed) -> ndarray | None
generate_partial_tokens_from_data_batch(data_batch, num_tokens_to_generate, sampling_config, tokenizer_config, latent_shape, task_condition, num_chunks_to_generate, seed) -> Tuple
generate_video_from_tokens(prompt_tokens, latent_shape, video_start_boundary, max_gen_len, sampling_config, logit_clipping_range, seed, context, context_mask) -> Tuple[Tensor, Tensor]

classes.name: ARVideo2WorldGenerationPipeline
overridden_methods: _run_model(prompt_embedding, prompt_mask, inp_vid, num_input_frames, seed, sampling_config) -> Tuple[List[Tensor], List[Tensor], Tensor]
_run_model_with_offload(prompt_embedding, prompt_mask, inp_vid, num_input_frames, seed, sampling_config) -> Tuple
generate(inp_prompt: str, inp_vid: Tensor, num_input_frames, seed, sampling_config) -> ndarray | None
classes.notes: Overrides generate() to: (1) guardrail on prompt, (2) embed text prompt via T5, (3) pass embeddings to AR model for cross-attn conditioning, (4) pass prompt_embedding to diffusion decoder

classes.name: AutoRegressiveModel
key_methods: generate(prompt_tokens, temperature, top_p, echo, seed, context, context_mask, max_gen_len, compile_sampling, compile_prefill, stop_tokens, verbose) -> Tuple[Tensor, ...]

classes.name: LatentDiffusionDecoderModel
key_methods: generate_samples_from_batch(data_batch, guidance, seed, state_shape, n_sample, is_negative_prompt, num_steps, apply_corruptor, corrupt_sigma, preencode_condition) -> Tensor
classes.notes: Used by diffusion_decoder_process_tokens(). Input: discrete token indices (B,T,H,W). Internally calls generate_samples_from_batch() with preencode_condition=True, then decode(). EDMEuler denoising loop with CFG.

classes.name: BaseDiscreteVideoFSQTokenizer
key_methods: __init__(name, latent_ch, is_bf16, pixel_chunk_duration, latent_chunk_duration, max_enc_batch_size, max_dec_batch_size, levels, compression_ratio)
encode(state: Tensor, pixel_chunk_duration=None) -> Tuple[Tensor, Tensor]  # returns (quantized_out BCTHW, indices BTHW)
decode(indices: Tensor, pixel_chunk_duration=None) -> Tensor  # returns pixel video BCTHW
classes.notes: Chunked encode/decode: splits temporal dim into chunks of pixel_chunk_duration, processes with max_enc/dec_batch_size to avoid OOM. encode() calls self.encoder(state) -> (indices, quantized_out, _)

classes.name: DiscreteVideoFSQJITTokenizer
classes.notes: Loads JIT-compiled encoder and decoder from file paths via torch.jit.load()

classes.name: DiscreteVideoFSQStateDictTokenizer
classes.notes: Uses nn.Module encoder (torch.compile-able) with JIT decoder. self.encoder = tokenizer_module.encode

classes.name: DiscreteMultimodalTokenizer
key_attributes: training_type: str  # text_only | text_to_video | video_to_video | image_text_interleaved
classes.notes: _tokenize_video calls video_tokenizer.encode() then fsq_quantizer.codes_to_indices(), adds BOV/EOV tokens, applies tokenizer_offset

classes.name: FSQuantizer
key_attributes: _basis: Tensor  # cumprod basis for index computation
key_methods: forward(z) -> Tuple[Tensor, Tensor, Tensor]  # (indices, quantized, dummy_loss)
classes.notes: FSQ: Finite Scalar Quantization (arxiv 2309.15505). No learned codebook; quantizes each channel independently.

key_relationships: ARBaseGenerationPipeline depends_on InferenceConfig, TokenizerConfig, DiffusionDecoderSamplingConfig, SamplingConfig

ARBaseGenerationPipeline.generate: - split tokens with overlap into chunks

important_notes: ARBaseGenerationPipeline.__init__ loads inference_config via create_inference_config(), loads diffusion decoder eagerly unless offload_diffusion_decoder=True
Diffusion decoder checkpoint: Cosmos-Predict1-7B-Decoder-DV8x16x16ToCV8x8x8-720p. Converts DV8x16x16 discrete tokens to CV8x8x8 continuous latents.
Video tokenizer: Cosmos-Tokenize1-DV8x16x16-720p (discrete, 8x16x16 compression). 6 latent channels, FSQ levels=[8,8,8,5,5,5].
LatentDiffusionDecoderModel inherits encode/decode from DiffusionT2WModel (continuous tokenizer CV8x8x8). Denoising uses EDMEulerScheduler with 35 steps, guidance=1.5.
Tensor parallel and context parallel supported via megatron.core parallel_state.
DiscreteMultimodalTokenizer supports training_types: text_only, text_to_video, video_to_video, image_text_interleaved.
